seoTitle: Duval County School Calendar 2026-2027 | Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Duval County School Calendar 2026-2027 for Jacksonville families. View DCPS first day, last day, holidays, breaks, printable dates and Google Calendar download.
calendarNotes: Duval County Public Schools, also known as DCPS, publishes the 2026-2027 school calendar as an online calendar page rather than a downloadable PDF on the supplied source. The school year starts August 10, 2026 and ends May 28, 2027. Thanksgiving Break runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, and Spring Break runs March 15-19. The calendar also lists weather days, planning days, teacher workdays, professional development days, and grading-period dates for Jacksonville families planning the school year.

calendarFaqs.q: What day does Duval County school start in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Duval County Public Schools starts the 2026-2027 school year on Monday, August 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Duval County Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 15 through Friday, March 19, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Duval County in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 28, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Why is there no PDF link for the Duval 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The supplied Duval district source is an online calendar page. This page links that district calendar page instead of listing a PDF download.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days are in the Duval County 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Duval County Public Schools has 180 instructional days in the 2026-2027 school year.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Duval County have early release days in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The reviewed 2026-2027 DCPS online calendar source used for this page emphasizes holidays, breaks, planning days, professional development days, weather days, and grading-period dates. Families should check school-level announcements for bell schedules or early-release details.

calendarFaqs.q: Can I add the Duval County school calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Download the unofficial Duval County .ics file from MySchoolDates and import it into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, iPhone, or Android calendar apps. It is a one-time import and will not automatically update if DCPS revises the calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: Is Duval County school closed on Veterans Day 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Veterans Day is listed on Wednesday, November 11, 2026 on the reviewed Duval County 2026-2027 school calendar.

yearNumbers.label: Official Source
yearNumbers.detail: The 2026-2027 source is a Duval district webpage rather than a PDF download.

yearNumbers.label: Weather Days
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar lists March 29, April 26, and June 1-2 as weather day windows.

yearNumbers.label: School-Year Span
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar runs from August 10, 2026 through May 28, 2027.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: The first day moves from August 11 in 2025 to August 10 in 2026.
Spring Break moves from March 16-20 in 2026 to March 15-19 in 2027.
The last day remains in late May, moving from May 28 in 2026 to May 28 in 2027.
